nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Gilles, Normand, Armand, Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Michel, Edouard, Gaston, Yves.

French, Walloon, English, German, Dutch, Flemish, and Breton (of French origin); Hungarian (Róbert): from the ancient Germanic personal name Ro(d)bert (Middle English Robert, Old French Ro(d)bert), composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This is found occasionally in Anglo-Saxon England before the Conquest, but in the main it was introduced into England by the Normans and quickly became popular among all classes of society. Pet forms and diminutives are found from an early date, Robin being particularly common. Compare Robair , Robar , Robare , and Rober .
In some cases also an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Rabbitt
meanings: English: from the Middle English male personal name Rabbode, Radboda (ancient Germanic Radbodo, from elements meaning ‘counsel’ + ‘messenger’).
English: from the personal name Robet or Robot, diminutives of Rob (see Robert ).
English: nickname from late Middle English rabet ‘young rabbit’. This word is not recorded until c. 1398, the usual Middle English word for ‘rabbit’ being cony (see Coney ).

variants.name: McRobbie
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire): patronymic meaning ‘son of Robbie’, from the personal name Robbie, a Scottish pet form of Robert , with the Gaelic prefix mac ‘son of’.

variants.name: Rabjohn
meanings: English (Devon, Essex): from the Middle English personal name Robechon (of Norman French origin: Old Picard Robichon, Old French Robeçun), a double diminutive of Rob, a pet form of Robert , altered by folk etymology to Robjohn and Rabjohn.

variants.name: Nabb
meanings: English (Lancashire): topographic name for someone who lived by a nab, Middle English nabbe ‘hillock, knoll’ (Old Norse nabbi ‘projecting peak, hill’), or a habitational name from any of the many minor places in northern and eastern England named with this word, for example Whalley Nab in Blackburn (Lancashire), Nab Scar in Rydal (Westmorland), and The Nab in Burgh Saint Margaret (Norfolk).
English (Lancashire): alternatively, it may be from the Middle English personal names Nabb and Napp, which are probably parallels to Nobb and Nopp, pet forms of Robert . Compare Nobbs .
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Aba(dh) ‘son of the abbot’, see McNab .

variants.name: Probert
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Roppert ‘son of Robert’(see Robert ).

variants.name: Rabb
meanings: Scottish and English (Lancashire): from the Middle English personal name Rab(b), a pet form of Robert with unrounding of the first vowel. Compare Robb .
Hungarian: variant of   Rab  .

variants.name: Rapson
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Rab(b) (a pet form of Robert with unrounding of the first vowel) + -son, with devoicing of /b/ to /p/. Compare Robson and Rabb .

variants.name: McCobb
meanings: Irish: from Mac Hob, ‘son of Hob ‘, an English pet form of Robert . Compare Hobson .

variants.name: McRoberts
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Roibeirt, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of the personal name Robert , with English excrescent -s.

variants.name: Robin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Andre, Emile, Marcel, Achille, Armand, Arnaud, Camille, Julien, Michel, Normand.
French, Breton, Scottish, English, and German: from the personal name Robin, a pet form of Robert , composed of the short form Rob + the hypocoristic suffix -in.
Slovenian: topographic name derived from rob ‘edge, border’ (see Robar ).

nameMeanings.name: Elen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Helen , now also used outside Wales. It is identical with the Welsh vocabulary word elen ‘nymph’, but this is unlikely to be the origin. It is found in Welsh texts from an early period as an equivalent of Helen, for example as the name of the mother of Constantine, finder of the True Cross.

variants.name: Elin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Elen .

en.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Robert was born in 1470, in Llandwrog, Caernarfonshire, Wales. She had at least 8 sons and 4 daughters with Owain ap Llywelyn. She died in 1515, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Robert est née en 1470, à Llandwrog, Caernarfonshire, Galles. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles avec Owain ap Llywelyn. Elle est décédée en 1515, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Robert wurde 1470 in Llandwrog, Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren. Sie hatte mit Owain ap Llywelyn mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1515 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Robert è nata il nel 1470 nel Llandwrog, Caernarfonshire, Galles. Lei avuto almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie con Owain ap Llywelyn. Morì nel 1515, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Robertは1470年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアランドウログで生まれた。彼女はOwain ap Llywelynとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1515年にイギリスウェールズで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Robert(은)는 1470년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 랜드로그에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Owain ap Llywelyn(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1515년 영국 웨일스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Robert nasceu em 1470, em Llandwrog, Caernarfonshire, Gales. Ela teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas com Owain ap Llywelyn. Ela faleceu em 1515, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Robert родилась в 1470 г. в местности лландрог, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери от Owain ap Llywelyn. Она умерла в 1515 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Robert nació en 1470, en Llandwrog, Caernarfonshire, Gales. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas con Owain ap Llywelyn. Murió en 1515, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
